Equations.Ground_Priority_Defense_Score: ( Variable_Target.Hints.Chokepoint + Variable_Target.Hints.PriorityTarget + Function_GenericPlanetValue.Evaluate + 2.0 * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + 2.0 * (1.0 - Variable_Target.ActiveTradeRoutes) + Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "Ground_Planetary_Shield", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses_Republic", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses_CIS"} + 2.0 * Function_Recent_Conversion.Evaluate * Function_Self_Present.Evaluate * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + Function_Recent_Conflict_Ground.Evaluate * Function_Self_Present.Evaluate * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + Function_Recent_Conflict_Space.Evaluate * Function_Self_Present.Evaluate * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + 2.0 * Function_Planet_Has_Capital_Building.Evaluate ) * Function_Can_Park_Ground_Unit.Evaluate
Equations.Ground_Priority_Defense_Score_Hero: ( Variable_Target.Hints.Chokepoint + Variable_Target.Hints.PriorityTarget + Function_GenericPlanetValue.Evaluate + Variable_Target.FriendlyForce.GroundTotalNBTD + Variable_Target.FriendlyForce.SpaceTotalNBTD + Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "Ground_Base_Shield", Parameter_Type = "Ground_Planetary_Shield", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses_Republic", Parameter_Type = "Galactic_Turbolaser_Tower_Defenses_CIS"} + Function_Planet_Has_Capital_Building.Evaluate - 10.0 * Variable_Target.FriendlyForce.GroundTotal{Parameter_Category = GameObjectCategoryType[InfantryHero | VehicleHero]} ) * Function_Can_Park_Ground_Unit.Evaluate
Equations.Space_Priority_Defense_Score: (Variable_Target.Hints.Chokepoint + Variable_Target.Hints.PriorityTarget + 2.0 * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + 2.0 * (1.0 - Variable_Target.ActiveTradeRoutes) + Function_GenericPlanetValue.Evaluate + Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "Ground_Ion_Cannon", Parameter_Type = "Ground_Hypervelocity_Gun"} + 2.0 * Function_Planet_Has_Capital_Building.Evaluate + (1.0 - Variable_Target.StarbaseLevel) + 2.0 * Function_Recent_Conversion.Evaluate * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate + Function_Recent_Conflict_Space.Evaluate * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate) * Function_Self_Present.Evaluate
Equations.Space_Priority_Defense_Score_Hero: (Variable_Target.Hints.Chokepoint + Variable_Target.Hints.PriorityTarget + Function_GenericPlanetValue.Evaluate + Variable_Target.FriendlyForce.SpaceTotalNBTD{Parameter_Category = GameObjectCategoryType[Corvette|Frigate|Capital|SuperCapital]} + Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "Ground_Ion_Cannon", Parameter_Type = "Ground_Hypervelocity_Gun"} + Variable_Target.StarbaseLevel - 10.0 * Variable_Target.FriendlyForce.SpaceTotalNBTD{Parameter_Category = GameObjectCategoryType[SpaceHero]}) * Function_Self_Present.Evaluate
Equations.Needs_Defensive_Fleet: (5000 > Function_Friendly_Space_Unit_Raw_Total.Evaluate) * Function_Is_Connected_To_Enemy.Evaluate * ( (Function_GenericPlanetValue.Evaluate > 0.8) + 0.5 * Function_Cautious_Personality.Evaluate + 2.0 * Function_Isolationist_Personality.Evaluate + Function_Economic_Personality.Evaluate * ( Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "TradeStation", Parameter_Only_Consider_Complete = 1.0} + Variable_Target.HasStructure {Parameter_Type = "Dasta_TradeStation", Parameter_Only_Consider_Complete = 1.0} + Variable_Target.StructureCount {Parameter_Type = "Tax_Agency", Parameter_Only_Consider_Complete = 1.0} ) + Function_Planet_Has_Ground_Company.Evaluate + Function_Is_Influence_Unit_Planet.Evaluate ) * Function_Is_Connected_To_Me.Evaluate * (Variable_Target.EnemyForce.HasSpaceForce == 0.0) * Variable_Target.EnemyForce.NearbySpaceTotal * (0 # 1)
